title: Add Topology zone clearance
description: Guarantee visible spacing between sibling zone regions in the Topology view while preserving intentional parent-child containment.
decision_notes: Sibling Topology zones have a minimum 24 layout-unit clearance.
Parent-child zones may overlap by containment because nesting is intentional.
Zone padding remains sufficient to contain member components while leaving the grid gap visible.
verification: Browser: golden-topology has 0 overlaps and no sibling pair below the 24-unit clearance threshold
